ShortDescription.Value: Road-Rail-Water Speed Limits: cars, trains, trams, subways, boats. Adjust one or drag to select many.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Adjust Speed Limits
Is a powerful, easy, full tool kit to control speed limits. Fine-tuned how fast vehicles should travel on any network type.
## 🎛️ Key Features
* **Adjust speeds on individual segments** with a simple click. * **Click-and-drag selection** to modify multiple segments at once. * Works on: * 🚗 **Roads** 🚊 **Tram tracks** 🚆 **Train tracks** 🚇 **Subway rails** ⛵ **Waterways** - Stats are intentionally light: only while the RSA panel is open, refreshed every 512 frames, using a Fast Bikes-style prefab lookup for bike/scooter classification.
## Important
* Vehicles are still limited by their max speeds (different for each type). * Performance: stats update only while the speed tool panel is open, and whole-city changes are processed in small batches to reduce stutter. * Removing this mod **does not reset** your customized speed limits. Any speeds you set will remain applied to the network segments until you delete/change the road. * ICE3 trains have top speed of 320km/h in real life, so slider will allow a little more at 400km/h. Game's own Unlimited highway speeds is ~400km/h.
## ❤️ Special Thanks
Huge appreciation hugs and waves to everyone * SwiftCobra creator of the first speed limit mod (MIT license) which passed to Aberro's mod (MIT) and then to DanielVNZ's version. * And everyone who tested, supported, or guided the development along the way! * Thumbnail photo taken in Toronto, Canada by [Alex Smith] https://unsplash.com/photos/time-lapse-photography-of-vehicles-in-busy-road-sRTLpqB5haw
tags: Road speed, water, seaway, train, rails, track speed, tracks, ship, boat, ferry.
